message:
test(sysvipc): pin semctl IPC_RMID invalid semid to exact EINVAL (bd-jm3h)

Replaces the broad is_expected_sysvipc_errno family sentinel in
semctl_ipc_rmid_without_variadic_arg_fails_for_invalid_semaphore_id
with an exact assertion against libc::EINVAL, matching host glibc's
return for semctl(-1, 0, IPC_RMID). Any future drift in the variadic
semctl error path will surface immediately.

Verification (rch + CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_frankenlibc_cc):
  cargo test -p frankenlibc-abi --test unistd_abi_test \
             semctl_ipc_rmid_without_variadic_arg_fails_for_invalid_semaphore_id
                                                     1 passed
  cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-abi --tests -- -D warnings  clean
  cargo fmt --check                                 clean
  ubs                                                exit 0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
